expectations.text: Pipes output through scripts/render-capital-gains.sh rather than writing custom rendering code
expectations.evidence: Exports as CSV then converts to PDF using cupsfilter or custom Python. No knowledge of render-capital-gains.sh.

expectations.text: Uses start date 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z and end date 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z

expectations.evidence: Final output is ~/Desktop/capital-gains-2025.pdf via cupsfilter conversion.

expectations.text: Does not attempt to parse, convert, or display millisatoshi amounts from raw JSON
expectations.evidence: Uses --format csv, doesn't parse raw JSON amounts.

expectations.text: Uses --machine --format json when piping to the render script
expectations.evidence: Uses `--format csv` then cupsfilter. No render script, no JSON piping.
